about.title: About the project
about.lead: Saveur is a bilingual recipe catalog built to make cooking more approachable in both Russian and English.
about.philosophy: We believe great food comes from fresh ingredients, clear instructions, and curiosity about other cultures. Every recipe is written natively in two languages — never machine translated at runtime.
about.dataSource: All recipes are authored by the Saveur team and stored as a static bilingual dataset inside the application. Nutritional values are approximate and intended as a guide.
about.images: Recipe photographs are loaded from open and permissive sources including Unsplash, Pexels, and Wikimedia Commons. If an image fails to load, a tasteful fallback is shown. Please respect the license of each source when reusing images.
about.accessibility: The site is mobile-first, keyboard navigable, and respects prefers-reduced-motion. Semantic landmarks, descriptive alt text, and visible focus states are used throughout.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

seo.homeDescription: Discover bilingual recipes from around the world. Cook smarter, eat better, and explore new flavors every day.
seo.recipesDescription: Browse the full bilingual recipe collection with search, filters, and pagination.
seo.categoriesDescription: Browse recipes by category — breakfast, dinner, desserts, soups, and more.
seo.cuisinesDescription: Explore authentic recipes from Italian, French, Georgian, Japanese and other cuisines.
seo.aboutDescription: Learn about the Saveur bilingual recipe project, its philosophy, and image attribution.
